activities_projects.title: Discussion on Feathered and Furry Friends
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to think critically about animals as companions and their role in space exploration
steps: Work in pairs and read the questions given before the story
Discuss who a feathered friend could be and give examples
Compare feathered and furry pets and their advantages
Share opinions about whether birds could accompany astronauts to space
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop communication skills and analytical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of reasoning and participation in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Development Activity
activities_projects.objective: Improve vocabulary and word recognition skills
steps: Read the meanings given in the exercise
Identify the correct word by inserting vowels
Write the complete word in the notebook
Use each word in a meaningful sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn vocabulary such as regulation, forbid, fuse, abruptly, confess, and dietitian
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct spelling and appropriate sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Story Comprehension Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand key events and scientific ideas presented in the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Identify why Sven secretly brought the canary Claribel to the space station
Explain how Claribel adapted to zero gravity
Discuss how Claribel helped the crew detect a problem with the air system
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect literary narrative with scientific concepts
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of explanation and understanding of the story (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Study of Sven
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the personality traits of Sven in the story
steps: List the qualities of Sven from the story
Identify examples that show his curiosity and responsibility
Explain how Sven's decision contributed to saving the crew
Present your analysis to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical reading and interpretation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and textual evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Claribel Detects the Danger
steps: Form groups of four or five students
Assign roles such as narrator, Sven, Jim, and crew members
Recreate the scene where Claribel collapses and the crew investigates the air problem
Perform the role play before the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the story through dramatization
activities_projects.evaluation: Expression, teamwork, and clarity of dialogue (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: True or False Critical Thinking Activity
steps: Read the statements provided in the exercise
Identify whether each statement is true or false
Write the correct answers and justify them using the text
Discuss the answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve analytical reading and reasoning abilities

activities_projects.title: Adjective Matching Exercise
activities_projects.objective: Understand the use of descriptive adjectives in context
steps: Read the adjectives given in the box
Match them with the appropriate nouns
Write the completed phrases in your notebook
Find sentences in the story where these adjectives appear
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn contextual usage of descriptive words

activities_projects.title: Merged Words Formation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how blended words are formed and used
steps: Study the example of merged words provided
Combine words from Column 1 and Column 2
Write the merged word and its meaning
Create a sentence using each merged word
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn word formation like motel, smog, sitcom, vlog, spork, and webinar
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct word formation and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Future Tense Grammar Practice
activities_projects.objective: Learn different ways of expressing future time
steps: Study the table showing different future tense forms
Fill in the blanks using the correct verb forms
Write additional sentences describing future events
Discuss your answers with the teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand grammatical structures for future references

activities_projects.title: Article Writing – Importance of Internet
activities_projects.objective: Develop structured writing and critical thinking
steps: Study the social media web provided in the textbook
Identify different uses of the internet
Write an article titled 'The Importance of Internet'
Include introduction, explanation of uses, and conclusion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve writing organisation and expression
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, clarity, grammar, and structure (10 marks)
